title: [release-1.14] Bump Go Jose to v3.0.5, CVE-2026-34986
body:
Bump Go Jose to v3.0.5 to address CVE-2026-34986\

then bump Skopeo to v1.14.6

Fixes: https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/OCPBUGS-81786,
https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-164976, https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHEL-164987
